name: Woven Banana Bark Folio Bin - Brightroom™: Rectangle Storage Basket, Brown, Renewable Resource, 17.12"x12.2"x6.29"
description:
Display your favorite books or decorative items in traditional style with the Woven Banana Bark Folio Bin from Brightroom™. Woven with banana bark, this natural-shade folio bin works well in a variety of spaces. This rectangular media bin features an open top to make it easy to stash away and remove the contents, and comes with cut-out handles for easy carrying and movement around your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
